CREATE TABLE user_attributes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, attribute_name VARCHAR(255), attribute_value VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE system_attributes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, attribute_name VARCHAR(255), attribute_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO user_attributes (id, attribute_name, attribute_value) VALUES (1, 'username', 'test_user');
INSERT INTO system_attributes (id, attribute_name, attribute_value) VALUES (1, 'database_name', 'test_db');
SELECT attribute_value FROM user_attributes WHERE attribute_name = 'username';
SELECT attribute_value FROM system_attributes WHERE attribute_name IN ('database_name', 'server_name');
SELECT ua.attribute_value FROM user_attributes ua JOIN system_attributes sa ON ua.id = sa.id WHERE sa.attribute_name = 'database_name';
SELECT * FROM user_attributes WHERE attribute_name LIKE 'user_%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM (SELECT attribute_name FROM user_attributes WHERE attribute_value IS NOT NULL) AS attribute_summary;
INSERT INTO user_attributes (id, attribute_name, attribute_value) VALUES (2, 'password', NULL);
SELECT attribute_value FROM user_attributes WHERE (attribute_name = 'username' OR attribute_name = 'password') AND attribute_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT attribute_name FROM user_attributes WHERE attribute_value IN (SELECT attribute_value FROM system_attributes);
SELECT sa.attribute_value FROM (SELECT * FROM system_attributes WHERE attribute_name = 'database_name') AS sa WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM user_attributes WHERE attribute_name = 'password');
CREATE TABLE configuration (config_key VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, config_value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT config_value FROM configuration WHERE config_key IN (SELECT attribute_name FROM user_attributes WHERE id = 2);
UPDATE user_attributes SET attribute_value = 'new_password' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT * FROM user_attributes WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM system_attributes WHERE attribute_value IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY id DESC;
